title: oligoneuron ohioense
intro: Oligoneuron ohioense, also known as Ohio goldenrod, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ohio goldenrod include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as colds and allergies. The herbal preparations of Oligoneuron ohioense often involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as a tea or added to topical creams and salves.
